Package org.episteme.natural.computing.loaders.pmml

package org.episteme.natural.computing.loaders.pmml
PMML (Predictive Model Markup Language) loader for machine learning models.

Parses PMML files containing regression, decision trees, neural networks, and other predictive models for portable model exchange.

See Also:
  • DMG PMML Standard

    Data field in PMML data dictionary.
    PMMLBridge
    Bridge for converting PMML DTOs to core Episteme machine learning objects.
